creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Marko Cupać from comment #0)

The support of grafana8 will be ended at next month. Besides, it's a rare case. Often, default limit (8192, https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/commit/9ea59e59f12f2b77699de9cafa5ceea1f7814eaf ) is enough to build a grafana port.

But I will keep in mind the solution. Thx.
